title: Email notifications for Workspace join requests?
excerpt:
After sending in a ticket I have been told that Email notifications ARE NOT available when people request to join a Workspace. Please add this feature. 
Email requests are sent with requests to join a board, but not Work…

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
After sending in a ticket I have been told that Email notifications ARE NOT available when people request to join a Workspace. Please add this feature.

Email requests are sent with requests to join a board, but not Workspaces . . . . odd.
